summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Galeri CRM application. Backend APIs working perfectly (18/18 tests passed). Frontend mostly functional with professional UI design and proper Turkish localization. Core CRM functionality including login, dashboard, car management, customers, and mobile navigation all working properly.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks causing timeouts

passed_tests: Car inventory page with search and sort functionality
Mobile bottom navigation with 5 navigation items
Add Car modal with full form validation
Professional UI design with Turkish localization
Car cards display with vehicle information
Demo user login with sample data (2 cars visible)
